title: Pabbly connect error
excerpt:
All my Pabbly Connect automations stopped working. the webhook works fine, but when i use the “get item” or “get board” i get errors and can’t see any groups or items in the “group” or “item” field. 
here’s what chatgpt …

posts.author: idanrox124 (Idan)
posts.cookedHtml:
All my Pabbly Connect automations stopped working. the webhook works fine, but when i use the “get item” or “get board” i get errors and can’t see any groups or items in the “group” or “item” field.

here’s what chatgpt had to say about the error: " It indicates that within your query to Monday.com’s API, you’re attempting to access a field named additional_info on an object of type ColumnValue , but this field does not exist according to the schema defined by Monday.com’s API."

WhatsApp Image 2024-03-14 at 14.04.541182×795 64.2 KB

WhatsApp Image 2024-03-14 at 13.49.00995×939 102 KB

posts.author: fabio_CO (Fabio)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m having the same error! No idea what happening.
API Key seems to be valid. Is it a Pabbly issue?

posts.author: idanrox124 (Idan)
posts.cookedHtml: i spoke with monday support and it seems the API structure has been updated but Pabbly didn’t catch up and now board related automations are broken

posts.author: idanrox124 (Idan)
posts.cookedHtml: Update - Pabbly are working on it and some of the functions have returned like “get group” and “create subitem” but all item related automation still don’t work.
